prompt: Modify the SVG stat chip at evals/files/status-chip.svg. Change the label from 'Latency' to 'Throughput', move the value text slightly right so it stays centered visually, and export the updated SVG plus a PNG preview. Keep the work in the Inkscape CLI workflow instead of editing the XML directly.
assertions: The revised SVG contains the updated label text 'Throughput'.
The saved project moves the value text to the right of its original x=44 position.
The run exported a non-empty PNG preview file.
